product.name: ArSuprem
product.categorySourceGroup: High Visible Warp Knit Fabrics for Safety Jackets
product.titleDescriptor: 100% Cotton Vat Dyed Single Jersey Fabric
product.specLine: 220 g/m², 100% Cotton, Single Jersey, Vat Dyed Knit Fabric
descriptions: 100% cotton single jersey workwear knit fabric with very high chlorinated bleaching and light fastness.
ArSuprem fabric are produced from the best quality combed yarn Turkish Cotton.
It is resistant to very high sun level, with fastness level of 6 to 7.
ArSuprem fabrics can be bleached with peroxide and hypochloride without whitening in color.
Vat dyed ArSuprem products can be used in the most hard working conditions and in military area.
100% Cotton Vat Dyed Single Jersey Fabric
220 g/m², 100% Cotton, Single Jersey, Vat Dyed Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Product is explicitly categorized under the hi-vis warp knit fabric group intended for safety jackets, directly supporting the high-visibility application.

The product description explicitly states use in the military area, providing direct textual evidence for military application, though the statement is brief and not detailed with specific military garment context.
UV protection and jersey knit could suit sportswear, but no explicit sport or athletic use is stated.

evidence: Vat dyed ArSuprem products can be used in the most hard working conditions
100% cotton single jersey workwear knit fabric
primary.rationale: The explicit technical parameter states 'Application: Workwear' and the description repeatedly frames the fabric as a durable, colorfast cotton jersey for hard working conditions, i.e., general industrial workwear, despite being grouped under a hi-vis warp knit category that doesn't match this plain vat-dyed jersey's described use as a T-shirt fabric.

evidence: Vat dyed ArSuprem products can be used in the most hard working conditions and in military area.
secondary.rationale: Military use is explicitly stated in the product description, independent of the primary workwear framing, supporting a secondary military application.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Category source group references hi-vis warp knit for safety jackets, but the product itself is a plain vat-dyed cotton jersey with no fluorescent color, EN ISO 20471 or reflective element stated; application image label is 'High Fastness T-Shirt', suggesting it's a base-layer/T-shirt fabric rather than a certified hi-vis garment fabric.
UV protection and jersey knit are present but no explicit sport or athletic use is stated.

modelOutput.reviewReason: Category placement (hi-vis warp knit for safety jackets) conflicts with the product's own description as a workwear T-shirt fabric with no fluorescent/reflective properties stated, creating ambiguity between hivis and workwear-industrial as primary.
